GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: [l_shipmode@0 ASC NULLS LAST]
  GpuSortExec
    GpuProjectExec
      GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_shipmode], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN orders.o_orderpriority = Utf8("1-URGENT") OR orders.o_orderpriority = Utf8("2-HIGH") THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN orders.o_orderpriority != Utf8("1-URGENT") AND orders.o_orderpriority != Utf8("2-HIGH") THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)]
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
          GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_shipmode@0], 8), input_partitions=8
            GpuAggregateExec: group_by=[l_shipmode], aggr=[sum(CASE WHEN orders.o_orderpriority = Utf8("1-URGENT") OR orders.o_orderpriority = Utf8("2-HIGH") THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END), sum(CASE WHEN orders.o_orderpriority != Utf8("1-URGENT") AND orders.o_orderpriority != Utf8("2-HIGH") THEN Int64(1) ELSE Int64(0) END)]
              GpuProjectExec
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                  GpuHashJoinExec
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([l_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                          GpuFilterExec
                            GpuScanExec: batch_size=14913080
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: target_batch_size=14913080
                      GpuRepartitionExec: partitioning=Hash([o_orderkey@0], 8), input_partitions=8
                        GpuScanExec: batch_size=14913080
--- memory ---
total_cost=1672
GpuSortPreservingMergeExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=48, output_bytes=48, cost=96
  GpuSortExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=48, output_bytes=48, cost=96
    GpuProjectExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=48, output_bytes=48, cost=96
      GpuAggregateExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=48, output_bytes=48, cost=96
        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=48, output_bytes=48, cost=96
          GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=48, output_bytes=48, cost=96
            GpuAggregateExec: row_width=48, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=64, output_bytes=48, cost=112
              GpuProjectExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=64, output_bytes=64, cost=128
                GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=64, output_bytes=64, cost=128
                  GpuHashJoinExec: row_width=64, subtree_max_row_bytes=144, input_bytes=80, output_bytes=64, cost=144
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=92, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=92, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                        GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=92, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                          GpuFilterExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=92, input_bytes=52, output_bytes=40, cost=92
                            GpuScanExec: row_width=52, subtree_max_row_bytes=52, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=52, cost=52
                    GpuCoalesceBatchesExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                      GpuRepartitionExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, input_bytes=40, output_bytes=40, cost=80
                        GpuScanExec: row_width=40, subtree_max_row_bytes=40, input_bytes=0, output_bytes=40, cost=40
